title: Focus Image (ImgFocus)
text: Focus Image (ImgFocus) The image that is displayed when the button field has focus. ImgFocus = " @ ImageFile | ^ GlyphName " Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description This property only works when a Default Image is set, and if Representation property is set to Uniface . Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(FLD1) = "ImgDefault=@filesave.png ; ImgFocus=@filesave_focus.png" Copy Applies To CommandButton Related Links Default Image (ImgDefault) The image that is displayed as the button or tab. Representation This property determines the appearance of the command button when running on the Microsoft Windows operating system (XP and later versions). One of Windows (default), Uniface, or Header. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
